theme: One word that resets a family of automata
title: One Word to Reset Them All
strategies: trivial: repeat one fixed letter for a while, ignoring the transition tables entirely

greedy: for each automaton independently, find A synchronizing word (pairwise-state-merge BFS, the textbook recipe), then bin-pack as many distinct per-automaton words as fit in the budget, cheapest first

strong: build the same per-automaton candidate words, but empirically test each one against EVERY automaton to discover shared/product transition structure, then pick the subset of words (by 0/1 subset search) whose UNION of resets is largest within the length budget -- one shared word can reset many automata at the cost of one
